docs.admin.p1: The admin panel is only accessible to accounts with the 'admin' role.
docs.admin.t1: Vets can request verification. You approve these under 'Verifications'. Verified vets upload tamper-proof documents (with a green vet badge) which can no longer be deleted by the pet owner (see End User Manual).
docs.admin.t2: In the 'Settings' tab, you can change the app name, main color, and logo. These adjustments are instantly active globally for all users without needing a server restart.
docs.admin.t3: All critical actions (animal deleted, role changed, settings adjusted) are logged in a tamper-proof and traceable manner in the audit log.
docs.admin.title: Administrator Manual
docs.dev.p1:
All REST API endpoints require a `Bearer <JWT>` token in the Authorization header (except Public routes).

The interactive Swagger/OpenAPI documentation can be found at the dedicated API subdomain:
👉 https://pawapi.oxs.at/documentation
docs.dev.t1:
GET https://pawapi.oxs.at/api/animals (Own animals)
GET https://pawapi.oxs.at/api/animals/by-tag/:tagId (Find animal via NFC)
PATCH https://pawapi.oxs.at/api/animals/:id (Edit animal)
POST https://pawapi.oxs.at/api/documents/:id/retry-analysis (Restart AI analysis)
docs.dev.t3: The system supports Google Gemini (default), Anthropic Claude, and OpenAI. Users can store their own keys in the profile. The backend iterates through the providers based on `ai_provider_priority`.
docs.dev.title: Developer Documentation (API)
docs.title: Documentation
docs.user.p1: Welcome! This system helps you digitally manage your animals and their documents.
docs.user.t1: Add animals via the 'Animals' tab. You can assign an NFC chip or barcode to each animal so it can be scanned globally if lost.
docs.user.t2: Navigate to the animal profile and click 'Scan Document'. Upload a photo. Our AI reads the document, categorizes it as vaccination or medication, and extracts all important data.
docs.user.t3: In the animal profile under 'Sharing' (lock icon), you decide exactly who can see which data. 'Read-only access' applies to public scans without login. 'Veterinarian' and 'Authority' for verified officials.
docs.user.title: End User Manual

landing.description: Seamless access via NFC/Barcode. The interface adapts to your role. Own animals display full profiles; third-party tags show shared documents only.

welcome.chipAdvantage: Others can find your pet using the chip, even without an account.
welcome.firstStepsIntro: This is the fastest way to get started with your pet profile, scanning, and document analysis.
welcome.howToAdd: How would you like to add your first pet?
welcome.manualCreateDesc: Create a pet profile manually with name, species, and breed — without a chip or barcode.
welcome.manualImportant: The pet will only be visible to you. Without a chip, others cannot scan it.
welcome.scanChipDesc: Scan the NFC chip or QR code on your pet's tag. PAW will automatically create a profile.
welcome.setupAiToken: Set up AI token in profile
welcome.stepAiDesc: During document scan, images are stored and, with configured AI providers, analyzed into structured suggestions such as title, type, and key fields.
welcome.stepManualDesc: Create your pet manually first if you want to enter name, species, breed, and other profile data directly.
welcome.stepScanDesc: With an NFC tag or barcode you can assign pets faster, find them again, and open them directly via scan in daily use.
welcome.stepTokenDesc: For precise AI analysis you need at least one configured AI token in your profile, for example Gemini, Claude, or OpenAI.
welcome.stepTokenWithDesc: The AI can identify the document type, extract key contents, and suggest structured information for further processing.
welcome.stepTokenWithoutDesc: The document is still stored and remains available for viewing, but there is no precise structured AI analysis.
welcome.subtitle: Manage your pets' vaccination records and documents securely in one place.
welcome.title: Welcome to PAW!
